title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: A teenage girl who believes in supporting lies for benevolent reasons marries a duty-driven police officer under unfortunate circumstances in the state of Rajasthan, India.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Rakesh's men infiltrate the hospital and plan to use a lethal injection to kill him once and for all, but Parineet shows up before them.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Soumya's decision to vote for Kareena as the next Guru Maa shocks everyone. Harman and Surbhi worry as Soumya go missing.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Rakesh's men infiltrate the hospital and plan to use a lethal injection to kill him once and for all, but Parineet shows up before them.

title: Jai Jagannath
subTitle: Following the cessation of the Kurukshetra War, Lord Krishna arrives in Dwarka to find turmoil and disarray. He then strives to re-establish harmony and faith.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder and the PAW Patrol team help to rescue a lost kitty. Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train which has become trapped by a rock slide.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Some cows escape from a train at the railway station and must be rounded up. Alex wants to help rescue Cali the cat from farmer Yumi's barn.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: When Mandy the monkey escapes from her cage on the train, Ryder and the PAW Patrol are led on a wild chase. During a bad windstorm, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to save an Owl trapped in a blown over tree and reunite her with her baby.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Skye and the pups must save a stunt pilot and her plane. The pups help Farmer Yumi prepare for her wedding day.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois get rescued. Chompy the Beaver takes a liking to the wood at Farmer Yumi's Farm.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must invade the Spider King's lair to rescue Apollo. Ryder and the others must rebuild a trapeze before a show.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder performs an incredible stunt during a rescue, inspiring a young boy to become a daredevil. Ryder entrusts the care of Adventure Bay to Robo-Dog while he and the pups have a holiday.

title: Khatra Khatra Khatra
subTitle: Aditya's act as a gangster falls flat when everyone pokes fun at him. Afterwards, Bharti romances Pearl V Puri, her distant husband.

title: Salaam-E-Ishq
subTitle: Aaliya and Zain are forced to get married to each other. However, they don't have any feelings for each other, except hatred.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
subTitle: Simar tells Prem that she knew he would forgive her. Prem corrects her saying that he returned for the pooja and he doesn't trust her. Prem leaves angrily and Roli tries to console Simar.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Kareena orders her followers to lock Soumya up after she became the Guru Maa. Saya thinks Kareena is abusing her power and intervenes.

title: Sindoor Ek Vachan
subTitle: Shantanu, a man of conviction who lives life according to his own principles, crosses paths with Poorna, who alters both his way of life and his worldview.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Kareena orders her followers to lock Soumya up after she became the Guru Maa. Saya thinks Kareena is abusing her power and intervenes.

title: Suman Indori
subTitle: Forced to marry a rich, shrewd politician, kind-hearted Suman adjusts to her new reality whilst dealing with a sister-in-law who harbours ambitions of being the head of the household.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Rajeev mentions that he is only at the venue for Parineet, and he later apologises to Neeti after informing her about his wedding to Parineet.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Rubble saves Jake from an avalanche, receives his vehicle, and becomes a member of the PAW Patrol. The Paw Patrol comes to the rescue when Wally the Walrus is tangled in an old fishing net.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: An alien spaceship crash lands at Farmer Yumi's. Now it's up to the gang to help out the stranded little extraterrestrial by fixing his ship and getting him back to his home planet.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Jake and Everest are excited about the Snowboard Competition, until they see the course is buried under a blanket of snow. PAW Patrol sets out to retrieve Cap'n Turbot's sunken diving bell.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: When a storm blows through the town right before a concert, the pups must work together to clean up the mess; Mayor Goodway's backpack slips down the side of a cliff with Chickaletta in it.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must chase down Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew when they steal gold discovered in Adventure Bay. Mayor Humdinger orders the Kit-tastrophe Crew to steal the Paw Patroller.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder investigates when jets of water start springing up all over town. The PAW Patrol helps a rancher find a spooked horse.

title: The Legend of Hanuman
subTitle: On the shores of Lanka, Ram and his army begin the battle against Ravan's forces to determine the fate of the universe.

subTitle: The Vaanars, along with Vibheeshan, try to parley with Ravan. Ram and Lakshman meet Indrajit in battle and face his deadly Nagastra weapons.

title: The Legend of Hanuman
subTitle: Tragedy looms over the Vaanar camp. Hanuman fights to survive his first battlefield encounter with the demon king.

title: The Legend of Hanuman
subTitle: As the fighting continues, Ravan decides to devise a backup plan by summoning his banished son, Ahiravan.

title: The Legend of Hanuman
subTitle: The winged demon, Vajramushti, is sent to destroy Lord Ram. Ahiravan returns to Lanka with a surprise guest and warns Ravan of the consequences of waking a cursed demon.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ellie, the baby elephant, has escaped from the circus train, and Mayor Goodway's chicken has gone missing, leading to a search of Adventure Bay.

subTitle: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off, Ryder and the Paw Patrol have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups get a new 18-wheeler mobile lookout. Just in time too, when Jake ends up lost in the south pole. He gets some extra help from a new friend, a pup called Everest.

subTitle: Vivaan, Ranjana and her father are invited as esteemed guests to a Mata parade, where they bump into Chakor.

subTitle: Unable to speak to Preeto about Soumya, Harman tries to make Harak Singh understand his situation. Maninder plans to vacate the house and move to Jalandhar, but Surbhi confronts him.

subTitle: Suman and Chandrakant challenge each other to a cooking competition. Despite Chandrakant's confidence, Suman unveils a hidden trick that could help her win.

subTitle: Rajeev gets into an awkward situation when the water runs out during his shower, and he calls for help. Parineet feels uncomfortable walking into the bathroom to give him the water but does it anyway. What will happen next?

subTitle: Bulbul devises a clever ploy to secure Sulakshana's permission to complete her education. Subsequently, Veer surprises Bulbul with a thoughtful present.
